sub_modules.conv3d_coords: Combinational decoder from flattened stream index to depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-padding boundary detector for complete 3D convolution windows.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array over the flattened 3D stencil window and flattened kernel.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_select: Combinational output gate that emits zero until a complete convolution window is available.
